domains.name: Storefront Commerce
domains.description: Products, orders, and line items from the storefront commerce platform, exposed over a GraphQL API. Answers questions about revenue, order volume, average order value, and best-selling products. Numeric amounts are in USD.
example_questions: What was total revenue by product category last month?
What is the average order value for orders shipped to EMEA this quarter?
Which products had the highest unit sales in Q2?
